title: Live Data / Enhanced PID Streaming
description: Read real-time sensor and system data from vehicle ECUs for diagnostic analysis. Foundation for AI-assisted anomaly detection and procedure guidance.
physical_solution: Stream real-time data to identify sensor values, actuator states, and system relationships. Use as context for AI procedure generation.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Yes — standard OBD Mode 01 PIDs universal. Enhanced OEM PIDs via $22 accessible on most OEMs with correct DID mapping.
preconditions: Ignition ON (engine running for live data)

procedure_steps.description: Request standard PIDs via Mode 01: $01 [PID]. Core: RPM (0C), coolant temp (05), throttle (11), MAP (0B), MAF (10), O2 sensors (14-1B).
Enhanced PIDs via $22 [DID]: OEM-specific data like fuel trim details, transmission temp, boost pressure, EGT.
Monitor anomaly thresholds: coolant >110°C, RPM unstable, MAP/MAF mismatch, fuel trim >±10%.
Describe observed symptom to AI. Live data snapshot is attached to ProcedureEngineer context for solution generation.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: Mode 01 fully compliant. Techstream-level enhanced PIDs accessible via $22 with Toyota DID map.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: Standard PIDs open. Honda enhanced DIDs partially documented in aftermarket community.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: Standard PIDs open. CONSULT-level enhanced data via $22 with Nissan DID map.
oem_notes.Ford: Standard PIDs open. MS-CAN enhanced PIDs need pins 3/11 adapter for body data.
oem_notes.GM: Standard PIDs open. SW-CAN enhanced data needs pin 1 adapter. GM-specific Mode 22 well documented.
oem_notes.BMW: Standard PIDs open. BMW enhanced data (DME/DDE PIDs) via $22 well documented by aftermarket community.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Standard PIDs open. VCDS/ODIS enhanced measuring blocks map to $22 DIDs.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Standard PIDs open. CAN-IHS body data needs pins 3/11. Pre-2018 enhanced data accessible.
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: Standard PIDs open. GDS Mobile enhanced PIDs map to $22. Generally accessible.
